# Skill: Recommendation Memo Synthesis

## Purpose
Generate recommendation-memo.md from worksheet evidence.

## Required Outputs
- Recommended path
- Confidence level
- Top 3 evidence drivers
- Risks and mitigations with owner/date
- 30-60 day plan
- Reassessment triggers

## Guardrails
- Keep statements evidence-backed.
- Keep recommendation aligned with viability and confidence rules.
- Do not invent missing customer facts.
